APPEAL MEMORANDUM; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY APPELLANT VASQUEZ, RAUL A

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2017 - MATTER SUBMITTED. AFTER HEARING ORAL ARGUMENT FROM COUNSEL, AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING THEREFOR, THE COURT ISSUES ITS RULING FROM THE BENCH AND DENIES CROSS-DEFENDANT RAUL A. VASQUEZ' APPEAL OF THE NOVEMBER 16, 2016 ORDER DENYING HIS MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT. COUNSEL FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AFTER HEARING AND SUBMIT SAME TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. ROBERT P. GARCIA, ESQ. APPEARED WITH APPELLANT/PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT RAUL A. VASQUEZ, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. MARGARET E. DEMATTEO, ESQ. APPEARED WITH RESPONDENT/DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT TEREZA MOLINA, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETERS SHANNON RAINTREE & MURIEL FALAK ASSISTED MS. MOLINA AT TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D611).
ORDER DENYING CROSS-DEFENDANT RAUL A. VASQUEZ' APPEAL OF THE NOVEMBER 16, 2016 ORDER DENYING CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT.
